invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破68000（基于ATR 641.76和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 68000 (based on ATR 641.76 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.099（基于ATR 0.0013和支撑位）或融资费率Z-score超过60%（显示轧多风险），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.099 (based on ATR 0.0013 and support) or funding rate Z-score exceeds 60% (indicating long squeeze risk).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破2050（基于ATR 21.99和支撑位）或融资费率Z-score超过95%（显示轧多风险），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 2050 (based on ATR 21.99 and support) or funding rate Z-score exceeds 95% (indicating long squeeze risk).
